[Adopted 6-2-1997 by Ord. No. 437; amended 11-13-2006 by Ord. No. 519]
This chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Zoning Ordinance of the Borough of Millersville, Lancaster County, Pennsylvania," hereinafter referred to as "this chapter."
The Millersville Borough Zoning Ordinance of 1975, as amended, is hereby repealed.
This chapter shall apply to all land and structures located within the limits of Millersville Borough. No land shall be used or occupied and no structure shall be used, occupied or erected except in conformity with this chapter.
This chapter is enacted for the following purposes: to promote, protect and facilitate one or more of the following: the public health, safety, morals, and the general welfare; coordinated and practical community development and proper density of population; emergency management preparedness and operations; the provisions of adequate light and air; police protection; vehicle parking and loading space; transportation; water, sewerage, schools, recreation and other public requirements.
